StyledText.Data: Created by: <<CreatedBy>>. • <<CreationTimestamp>> |. Last modified by: <<ModifiedBy>> • <<Container modified>>

LayoutObject.name: AI Output

Calculation.Text: FAT Media::Container file extension ≠ "JPG" And FAT Media::Container file extension ≠ "PNG"
FAT Media::Container file extension ≠ "MP3" And FAT Media::Container file extension ≠ "MP4" And FAT Media::Container file extension ≠ "MPG"

StyledText.Data: Add an IO of type User media to replace this media during runtime.

Calculation.Text: FAT Modifier @ Page item::Unprettified name ≠ "Block Duration" And FAT Modifier @ Page item::Unprettified name ≠ "Block Label" And FAT Modifier @ Page item::Unprettified name ≠ "Block Thumbnail" And FAT Modifier @ Page item::Importance = 1 And PrivilegeAccess ( FAT Modifier @ Page item::Privilege )

LayoutObject.name: Modifier description popup

Calculation.Text: "Remove all IOs for this page item"

FAT Modifier @ Page item::Unprettified name ≠ "Block Duration" And FAT Modifier @ Page item::Unprettified name ≠ "Block Label" And FAT Modifier @ Page item::Unprettified name ≠ "Block Thumbnail" And FAT Modifier @ Page item::Importance = 1 And PrivilegeAccess ( FAT Modifier @ Page item::Privilege )
